chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI HCA No.350 of 2016 Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For order on office objection. 2 For hearing of main case 14.03.2023 Mr. Muhammad Nazir Tanoli, Advocate for Appellant. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the appellant while filing the statement submits that possession of the property is with the appellant as per the compromise decree dated 05.3.2013, hence at present he has no grievance and present HCA may be disposed of. Order accordingly. H.C.A stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE SM 2 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI HCA No.162 of 2015 Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For order on office objection. 2 For hearing of main case 14.03.2023 Mr. Muhammad Nazir Tanoli, Advocate for Appellant. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the appellant under the instruction does not press instant HCA, which is accordingly dismissed as not press. JUDGE JUDGE SM 3 4 HCA No.162 of 2015 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case
